creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please run the following command:

find /usr/local/lib -name '*.la' | xargs grep -l 'libiconv\.la' | xargs pkg which

It should print a list of packages.  Make sure you have the latest version of each.  Then do the same for libffi.la:

find /usr/local/lib -name '*.la' | xargs grep -l 'libffi\.la' | xargs pkg which
